product: Splunk Enterprise search jobs over the splunkd REST API
interface: search/v2 job endpoints plus the v1 control endpoint on the management port (8089)

auth.scheme: Authorization: Bearer <authentication token> header on every request; the token never appears in URLs or error messages

create_job.spl_rule: if the query does not already start with the search command or a generating pipeline (leading |), prepend 'search '

job_status.content_fields: entry[0].content carries sid, dispatchState, isDone, isFailed, doneProgress, resultCount, messages
job_status.polling: poll with an injected sleep between polls only; isFailed=true is terminal and carries the failure in content.messages

results.paging: offset advances by count; a page shorter than count is the last page; server order is preserved; result cell values are strings
results.not_ready: 204 No Content while the job is not done - the client must not treat it as an empty result set

control.note: job control is v1-only; there is no /services/search/v2/jobs/{sid}/control
control.form: action=finalize | action=cancel (also pause, unpause, touch, setttl)
